use_cases: Display file preview with color-coded type indicator in document management dashboards
Show uploaded document information with visual format badges in file upload interfaces
List documents with format-specific visual hierarchy in media libraries
Present file collections with placeholder skeleton loading states
Organize and categorize various file types with distinct color coding
ai_summary: A file card component featuring color-coded banners for 28 different file formats (documents, spreadsheets, presentations, archives, code files, and media), with a placeholder skeleton design for loading states. Supports multiple file types including doc, pdf, md, csv, xls, zip, code, html, js, tsx, img, video, and more with format-specific color schemes.
